item.title: A message from: Mr. Longval:
item.description: Attention: grade 9's to 11's! Anyone interested in playing tackle football in the fall for the Varsity Team, we will be having a pre-camp- May 25, 27 and June 1 and 3. Please sign up outside Mr. Longval's office. Signups close Wednesday May 13.

item.title: A message from the cafeteria:
item.description: The last day for the cafeteria to be open for the school year is May 20th

item.title: A message from Mr. Vonesch:
item.description: This is a reminder that the deadline for Little Caesars pizza orders is this Sunday! Please talk to your parents about getting some tasty pizza for the family while supporting the Costa Rica Service Team and complete your order online! If you have any questions, please see Mr. Vonesch.

item.title: A message from Mrs. Kwok:
item.description: There will be a Unity Club meeting today at lunch in room 127. All panelists and supporters are asked to attend. New members are always welcome!

item.title: A message from Mr. Cornellier:
item.description: Congratulations to the girls' slo-pitch team who won against Le Sommet yesterday and lost a close one to l'Escale. Bethany and Aila led the way with the offense, and Kara led the defense with her solid pitching.

item.title: A message from Mme. Perron.
item.description: A reminder to Europe Team members responsible for planting poppy's that we will be planting with Mrs. Brennan on Monday morning. Please bring proper footware and gloves if available. There will be a brief meeting on Tuesday next week for team members running the canteen at the community event next Thursday and a message to all team members to continue collecting items for the silent auction for our trivia night please bring items to Mme Perron, Mrs Bourdon or Mr. Kwok.
